scope: Effectively presented systems formed by simultaneous conjunctions of the six positively represented USD-W1 feature subclasses, subject to explicit interface-compatibility conditions; actual-process correspondence excluded.

all_six_construction.state: A countably presented hybrid configuration carrying semantic-versioned commitments, dependency records, observation state, probability-kernel state, and append-only revision history.
all_six_construction.evolution: Declared hybrid flow and jump semantics with computable guards, measurable stochastic kernels, explicit semantic-version transitions, and prefix-coherent history extension.
all_six_construction.observation: A computable observation interface that may be partial but exposes certified bounded queries without revealing hidden or future state.
all_six_construction.recovery: One uniform finite-query interface recovers current commitments, admissibility, grounds, dependencies, semantic versions, probability queries, and finite historical prefixes to requested certified precision.

interaction_findings.boundary: semantic switches must occur at declared events or through an effectively specified continuous semantic interface
observational equivalence cannot be promoted to semantic identity
unrestricted infinite-horizon exact queries remain excluded
noncomputable measures and uncertified tails remain excluded

interaction_findings.finding: pass_for_effectively presented partially observed stochastic hybrid systems
interaction_findings.boundary: filtering and conditioning require computable positive-evidence interfaces
compatibility conditions are substantive assumptions and are not automatic for arbitrary conjunctions

nonclaims: all mathematically possible feature conjunctions compose
compatibility conditions are globally minimal or necessary
